title: 秋華賞の後に・冠、掲げて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober carves her name into history after
completing the Triple Tiara with an outstanding
performance!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though the audience's cheers threaten to move
her to tears, Mejiro Dober presents herself in a
refined manner befitting a queen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, Mejiro Dober thanks me again for
believing in her, and the two of us take our first
step toward our new future!
